evals.prompt: Add a test to IntegerStrategyTests.cs for when min > max is passed to Gen.Integers<int>() — I expect it to throw ArgumentOutOfRangeException
evals.expected_output: A new [Fact] test added to IntegerStrategyTests.cs named something like Integers_MinGreaterThanMax_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRange, using Assert.Throws<ArgumentOutOfRangeException>. Build must fail (red) since this behavior may not be implemented.
expectations: A new test is added to the existing IntegerStrategyTests.cs file, not a new file
The test method name follows the MethodName_Condition_ExpectedResult convention
The test uses Assert.Throws<ArgumentOutOfRangeException> or equivalent xUnit pattern
The test calls Gen.Integers<int> with min > max
The report states whether the build/test run is red (failing)

evals.prompt: Write tests for the existing SelectStrategy — Gen.Integers<int>(0, 10).Select(x => x * 2) should always return even numbers in [0, 20], and an identity selector should return values in the same range as the source
evals.expected_output: A new SelectStrategyTests.cs file in src/Conjecture.Tests/Strategies/ with at least 2 [Fact] tests covering the mapping and identity cases. Build must be red.
expectations: A new file is created at src/Conjecture.Tests/Strategies/SelectStrategyTests.cs
The file uses file-scoped namespace matching Conjecture.Tests.Strategies
At least one test verifies that Select() transforms values correctly
Tests follow the MethodName_Condition_ExpectedResult naming convention
The report states whether the build/test run is red (failing)

evals.prompt: I want tests for a new DictionaryStrategy — Gen.Dictionary(keyGen, valueGen, minCount: 0, maxCount: 5) should produce dictionaries where all keys are unique and counts are within [0, 5]. The type doesn't exist yet.
evals.expected_output: A new DictionaryStrategyTests.cs file with tests for uniqueness of keys, count bounds, and that values satisfy the value generator. Build must fail since DictionaryStrategy doesn't exist.
expectations: A new test file is created at src/Conjecture.Tests/Strategies/DictionaryStrategyTests.cs
Tests cover key uniqueness (no duplicate keys in generated dictionaries)
Tests cover count bounds (generated count is within [minCount, maxCount])
The skill uses #pragma warning disable or similar to handle missing type without creating a stub
The report states the build fails due to the missing DictionaryStrategy type
